title: Introduce outcome coverage matrix and outcome benchmark cases
description: Expand AOF benchmark coverage beyond artifact correctness into outcome correctness, including user rejection, value illusion, and vanity success failure modes.
triage_notes: Completed on 2026-06-15 by defining docs/v3-outcome-coverage-matrix.md, recording outcome coverage matrix plus case set artifacts, and connecting the benchmark plan to outcome-report and learning-loop evidence surfaces.
